scope: A minimal Todo REST API (Express + SQLite) exposing CRUD endpoints plus fetch-by-id.

decisions.decision: Use Express.js as the HTTP framework
decisions.rationale: Minimal framework for a small CRUD API

acceptance_criteria.description: POST /todos with a valid title returns 201 and the created todo
GET /todos returns 200 and a JSON array of todos
GET /todos/:id returns 200 and the todo, or 404 if not found

files_to_create.purpose: CRUD + fetch-by-id route handlers for todos
